case_title: REVERA, MILDRED M. vs. SZEGEDI, BARBARA G.

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REVERA, MILDRED M. AS TO DEFENDANT SZEGEDI, BARBARA G. SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT SZEGEDI, BARBARA G. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SZEGEDI, BARBARA G.
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT SZEGEDI, BARBARA G.

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF REVERA, MILDRED M. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-13-1998 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 606 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-19-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

ROOM 606, VJ JOHN ERTOLA, GGOROSIN, CLERK C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, ALL PARTIES PRESENT. AFTER LENGTHY DISCUSSIONS IN CHAMBERS COURT TOLD ATTYS TO CALL BY NOON TOMORROW, 8/14/98, TO TELL US WHETHER THE CASE WAS SETTLED OR NOT.

ROOM 606, VJ JOHN ERTOLA, GGOROSIN, CLERK C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. AS PER COURT'S INSTRUCTIONS TO ATTYS YESTERDAY, PLTF'S OFFICE (SHARON) LEFT MESSAGE TO CLERK, ROOM 606 (GRACE) THAT CASE HAS SETTLED BUT REQUESTS THAT IT BE LEFT ON TRIAL CALENDAR TO FINALIZE SETTLEMENT.
OFF JURY CALENDAR A/C FAILURE TO DEPOSIT JURY FEES WITHIN PRESCRIBED TIME AS SET FORTH IN SEC. 631 CCP RESET FOR COURT TRIAL ON AUG-19-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES, FILED BY PLAINTIFF REVERA, MILDRED M. SZEGEDI, BARBARA G.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REVERA, MILDRED M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SZEGEDI, BARBARA G. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 18 BENNINGTON ST., LEASE FORFEITED, STIPULATED-SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR ALL TERMS & CONDITIONS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
